build.buildCommand: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate && npm run build && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public .next/standalone/public

deploy.startCommand: node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy && HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 node .next/standalone/server.js
